scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:dashboard
